name: Transactional Email with Resend
description: Set up Resend for transactional email with React Email templates. Includes welcome email, password reset, invoice, and notification templates. Custom domain setup for near-100% inbox delivery.

steps.description: Create welcome email template with company branding, user name, and CTA button
Create password reset email with secure reset link and 24-hour expiry notice
Create invoice email with line items table, total, and PDF attachment support
Create sendEmail(to, template, props) wrapper with error handling and dev-mode preview

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Beautiful HTML emails with React Email — and actually get delivered to inbox
